title: Mandala Precision Geometry
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for high-precision mandala images where cultural geometry, radial symmetry, and optical balance must hold under close visual inspection.

en.title: Mandala Precision Geometry
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for high-precision mandala images where cultural geometry, radial symmetry, and optical balance must hold under close visual inspection.

zh-CN.title: 曼荼罗精密几何
zh-CN.description: 一个测试高精度曼荼罗图像的 Prompt Atlas 主题，要求文化几何、放射对称与视觉平衡都能经受近看检验。
